about.title: About - Entropy Music
about.bio1: Beginning with classical piano training in childhood, he pursued systematic studies in music aesthetics at Xinghai Conservatory of Music and later conducted in-depth research on hip-hop culture and sampling art at Goldsmiths, University of London.
about.bio2: Over the past decade, his work has spanned several domains, including music education, music hardware development, electro-acoustic instrument design, and interdisciplinary workshop curation.
about.bio3: His creative practice is grounded in classical foundations and centers on developing contemporary, exploratory, and thoughtfully designed artistic experiences.

firmware.title: Firmware - Entropy Music
firmware.tutorialStep1: 1. Download the firmware file for your product
firmware.tutorialStep2: 2. Connect your device to computer via USB
firmware.tutorialStep3: 3. Enter bootloader mode (hold button while connecting)
firmware.tutorialStep5: 5. Select the downloaded file and click update
firmware.tutorialNote: Note: Do not disconnect the device during update process.

workspace.saveTitle: Download the current configuration as JSON
workspace.loadTitle: Load a configuration from a JSON file

toolbar.autoTitle: Sync automatically when a device is selected

help.title: How To Use This Page
help.p1: 1. Connect your Entropy Music device by USB and allow MIDI SysEx access if prompted.
help.p2: 2. Choose your device from the MIDI dropdown. Auto sync is on by default; turn it off if you want to use the Sync button manually.
help.p3: 3. Click a slider, knob, or button on the on-screen controller, then edit its MIDI channel, CC, pitch bend mode, name, or LED colors if supported.
help.p4: 4. Pick a different bank when your device supports multiple banks.
help.p5: 5. Click UPLOAD to send the current bank settings back to the hardware.
help.sp1: The Sync button reads the current device settings into the app.
help.sp2: The light turns green after sync succeeds. Upload still works when the light is off, but the app may not match the device's current settings.
help.sp3: Auto sync runs when a MIDI device is selected. If sync fails, click Sync again or reselect the device.

settings.confirmUploadHint: Ask before sending settings to the hardware.

settings.confirmUploadPrompt: Upload the current bank settings to the device?
